page_metadata.biotools__summary: Interactive electrode localization utility (ielu) is a software package that provides a full pipeline for the registration, localization, and labeling of iEEG electrodes from CT and MR images.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Interactive electrode localization utility (ielu) is a software package that provides a full pipeline for the registration, localization, and labeling of iEEG electrodes from CT and MR images.
